connections.gloss: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), utter, [idiom] well, [idiom] work.
preach, say, speak (after), talk, tell, utter
connections.def: a prolonged form of an otherwise obsolete verb; to talk, i.e. utter words:--preach, say, speak (after), talk, tell, utter. Compare 3004. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: [phrase] answer, by-word, matter, any thing (what) to say, to speak(-ing), speak, talking, word.
